import pandas as pd

def load_csv(path: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    return pd.read_csv(path)

def get_user_name(user_id: int) -> str:
    return f"user_{user_id}"

def format_date(dt) -> str:
    return dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")

def compute_summary(df: pd.DataFrame) -> dict:
    return {
        "count": len(df),
        "mean": df["value"].mean(),
        "std": df["value"].std(),
    }
